summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 1-5 operational maturity modules: Historical Metrics Storage, Alerting System, Enhanced Sandbox Validation, Connector Reliability Monitoring, and Multi-Property Integration Dashboard. All 27 backend tests pass. All 11 frontend tabs load correctly with proper data display.
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 tabs properly implemented: Sync Health, Alerts, Reliability, Reconciliation, Scheduler, Credentials, Error Queue, Observability, Readiness, Sandbox Validation, Multi-Property
Alerting System working with 10 default rules, acknowledge/resolve/mute/dismiss actions functional
Reliability monitoring shows MTBF, MTTR, uptime, sync success rate, ACK success rate, failure patterns per connector
Multi-Property dashboard shows property-level aggregation, cross-property comparison, health overview
Sandbox Validation tab has connector selector and Full Validation button ready for validation runs
Turkish language labels properly displayed throughout the Admin Control Panel
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing connectors and properties
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Control Panel now has 11 tabs covering all Phase 1-5 operational maturity modules. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_operational_maturity.py cover Historical Metrics, Alerting, Sandbox Validation, Reliability, and Multi-Property modules. All APIs use real MongoDB - no mocked endpoints. Login with demo@hotel.com/demo123, then navigate to /app/admin-control-panel.

alerting_system.POST /alerts/evaluate: Evaluate rules and create alerts - WORKING

frontend_tabs.Sync Health: WORKING - Shows health score, 24h trend chart, connector cards
frontend_tabs.Alerts: WORKING - Shows 9 active alerts, filters, acknowledge/resolve/mute actions
frontend_tabs.Reliability: WORKING - Shows MTBF/MTTR/uptime metrics, failure patterns
frontend_tabs.Sandbox Validation: WORKING - Connector selector and validation button
frontend_tabs.Multi-Property: WORKING - 5 properties, health distribution, comparison view

mocked_apis_note: All APIs use real MongoDB - no mocked endpoints
